Natural results, delivered with genuine care

Boutique aesthetics & wellness by Ashley Men, MSN, APRN, FNP-C — where every treatment starts with a real conversation about your goals.

Chat with us
Here to help, anytime
Questions? Just ask Lexi.

Wondering if Botox or filler is right for you? Curious about microneedling, IV therapy, or how to get on Ashley's schedule? Lexi knows the full menu — and can help you request your appointment right now.

Meet Ashley
Every treatment starts with a real conversation — your goals, your face, your plan. Refreshed, never overdone.

Ashley Men, MSN, APRN, FNP-C is a Certified Family Nurse Practitioner and the founder of Luxe Aesthetics Jacksonville. With over 17 years of nursing experience spanning Critical Care, Emergency Medicine, Acute Care, and primary care, she brings a depth of medical judgment to aesthetics that few injectors can match. Her clients agree — Luxe holds a perfect 5.0 rating across more than 100 reviews, built one natural-looking result at a time.

🌸 · ✨ · 🌸
What we offer
Treatments & Services
Advanced aesthetics with natural results — tailored plans, never cookie-cutter.
✨
Botox & Neurotoxins
Smooth fine lines and soften expression wrinkles — refreshed and natural, never frozen.
💫
Dermal Fillers
Restore volume and define contours with precise placement by an experienced nurse practitioner.
🩸
Microneedling & PDGF
Collagen-stimulating skin rejuvenation that improves texture, tone, and radiance from within.
🧴
Medical-Grade Skincare
Skincare consultations and clinical-strength products matched to your skin, not the trend cycle.
💧
IV Therapy
Hydration and nutrient infusions to support energy, recovery, and overall wellness.
📱
Virtual Care
Acute care and sick visits by telehealth — real medical care from a provider you already trust.

Advanced aesthetics with natural results — rated 5.0 by 100+ clients

Care beyond the spa
Virtual Visits, When You Need Them

Feeling under the weather? Luxe offers convenient telehealth appointments for acute care and sick visits — so the provider who knows you is just a video call away, wherever you are.
